task_completion.description: Set the screen background to dark gray and add the 'Centrifuge 101 Overview' header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main display page in the Crimson 3.0 workspace has a dark gray background color and a text primitive at the top (or prominently placed) reading 'Centrifuge 101 Overview'.

task_completion.description: Create the required data tags in the Navigation pane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Navigation pane (usually on the left under 'Data Tags') shows the tags: Bowl_Speed, Feed_Rate, Diff_Pressure, Vibration_Level, and Pump_Run_Cmd.

task_completion.description: Add data displays for Bowl_Speed, Feed_Rate, and Diff_Pressure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main display page contains data boxes or text primitives configured to display the values for Bowl_Speed, Feed_Rate, and Diff_Pressure.

task_completion.description: Add a visual gauge or graph for the Vibration_Level tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A gauge, meter, or graph primitive is present on the display page, and it is explicitly labeled 'Vibration Monitor'.

task_completion.description: Add a control button for the Pump_Run_Cmd tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A button primitive is present on the display page with the text label 'Feed Pump Control'.

task_completion.description: Save the project as 'centrifuge_main.c3' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Crimson 3.0 window title bar displays 'centrifuge_main' or 'centrifuge_main.c3', or a 'Save As' dialog screenshot shows the file being saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Red Lion Crimson 3.0 GUI to build the HMI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Crimson 3.0 interface (e.g., dragging primitives, configuring properties in dialog boxes), not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The HMI elements are genuinely created within the Crimson workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The elements (buttons, gauges, text) appear inside the Crimson 3.0 page editor with standard selection handles or property popups, rather than being drawn in an image editor or mocked up elsewhere.

integrity.description: The agent did not attempt to write the .c3 binary/proprietary file directly using a text editor or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent trying to echo or write raw bytes/text into a .c3 file via PowerShell, VS Code, or Notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected project save path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\centrifuge_main.c3. The style guide path is expected to be C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\CrimsonTasks\isa101_hmi_style_guide.txt. Note: The style guide file may be missing from the environment due to a known defect, but the agent is still expected to fulfill the explicit visual requirements (dark gray background, specific headers, tags, gauge, and button) provided in the prompt.
